purpose: Minimal canonical structure reference for file-owned runtime shells.
notes: This file is intentionally minimal. It defines the baseline structure for all normal files.
System Files owns the full file structure and token registry at runtime via Defined_Structure.
Do not treat this document as a live payload source.

required_sections.label: System
required_sections.description: Identity, provenance, and system-owned fields (ID + History).

required_sections.label: LDB
required_sections.description: Declared local relationships. Behavior is defined by shared LDB contracts.

required_sections.label: General
required_sections.description: Primary descriptive fields. Name and Summary are the shared starter tokens.

view_notes: Views are section labels in the file-owned structure contract.
No subgroup layer is active in runtime shells.
